goal: Freeze the next-phase lane shape, priorities, non-goals, and architecture mapping after Mermaid 11.15 structural parity completion.
handoff: DONE. Lane shape now maps the 2026-06-01 architecture audit to bounded tasks, records the honest post-11.15 residual front, and freezes the execution order: truth/governance, then shared seams, then deep audits/family rubric.

goal: Create a single Mermaid baseline registry/provenance seam and stop presenting stale 11.12-era baseline names as current truth across production surfaces.
handoff: DONE. Added merman-core baseline truth module, moved Engine/default registry construction to pinned-baseline constructors, routed importer/bench/xtask live surfaces away from default_mermaid_11_12_2*, and made the legacy generated suffix explicit historical provenance instead of active baseline identity.

goal: Create and apply a residual taxonomy for parity-root and related residual work.
validation: top active residual buckets classified in docs
handoff: DONE. Residual governance now uses a durable six-class taxonomy and the active root residual lane maps Flowchart/Architecture/Sequence/Class/Timeline/Journey buckets into it without pretending the counts are completion percentages.

goal: Extract reusable measurement/root-bounds seams so future parity fixes stop embedding hidden browser-like bbox heuristics across diagram code.
validation: no-growth review of ad hoc constants
handoff: DONE. Moved svg_emitted_bounds to svg/parity root-bounds infrastructure, centralized Sequence note final wrap/measure across layout/root/render, and verified no override growth. The long leftOf note root-width residual remains open and should not be overfit.

goal: Audit manatee/dugong-adjacent layout behavior through source-backed input-model seams, starting with Architecture residual families.
validation: focused Architecture residual evidence with per-seam outcomes
handoff: IN_PROGRESS. Architecture FCoSE adapter and root-bounds work now distinguishes node BoundsExtras, edge-label createText transforms, SVG group bbox padding, source-checkout authority, and Cytoscape bbox phases without forcing residuals closed. Architecture structural parity remains green and parity-root remains the expected 26 mismatches after the latest behavior-preserving Architecture seams. Dugong-adjacent audit is source-backed: repo-ref/dagre and repo-ref/graphlib are pinned, Graphlib has a coverage ledger, exposed helper algorithm tests are ported, public Graph API source-test slices cover current consumer-relevant basics/queries/invariants, and Rust/JS API-shape differences remain explicit. ARCH-022's first Dagre reference adapter slice is landed: dagre_reference.rs owns the Rust-side reference schema, JS harness invocation, compound-edge normalization, Rust snapshots, and delta extraction, while compare-dagre-layout remains a State-only graph producer. Architecture Cytoscape service-label measurement now has a shared ArchitectureCytoscapeServiceLabelExtension seam used by FCoSE node BoundsExtras and SVG root/group service bounds, while SVG root createText measurement stays separate. Continue residual-driven audits; do not start a broad solver rewrite, fake browser-bound parity, or implement unused Graphlib algorithms without a Mermaid/Dagre consumer.

goal: Pilot a deeper one-semantic-truth direction for one high-value diagram family to reduce typed-vs-JSON parallel master paths.
validation: Sequence compatibility JSON now projects from SequenceDiagramRenderModel
handoff: DONE. Sequence was selected as the pilot because it already had a typed render model but still carried a separate JSON master path in SequenceDb::into_model. The compatibility JSON adapter now lives on SequenceDiagramRenderModel::to_compat_json(...), SequenceDb::into_model delegates through into_render_model(), and the typed-vs-JSON parse test covers actors, boxes, messages, notes, create/destroy indexes, omitted placement, and omitted centralConnection. This does not claim repo-wide semantic unification or Sequence root-measurement closure; Sequence structural parity remains green while root parity still reports existing measurement residuals.

goal: Define a durable rubric and priority order for unsupported Mermaid families.
handoff: Enable later family workstreams without starting them here.
